form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.11) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing eighth and beaten 10 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 411m (23.18) beating Western Lies in Free For All on April 9. Has clocked a scorching 27.32 here at this trip. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Marred approaching the winning post on the final occasion and lost ground.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (27.80) over 484m at this track. Key chance on that latest effort.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.92) at Grafton in a NG, finishing seventh and beaten 11 lengths. Strong record off the draw with two wins and two minors from five starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.45) in a Free For All, finishing a 4 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Others rate better this time.
